disambiguation_rules.administrator: Resolved to Administrator of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration per SEC. 101(1)
disambiguation_rules.director: Multiple directors referenced: National Center for Atmospheric Research and National Science Foundation in SEC. 102(a)
disambiguation_rules.secretary in sec. 301-303: Secretary of Energy per SEC. 301 definition; distinct from prior uses of 'Secretary' referring to multiple department secretaries

parsing_rules: Section 301 appears to be a definitional provision. The actual definition of 'Secretary' is not provided in the extracted text, suggesting the full definition exists elsewhere in the document. Future parsing should capture the complete definition when available.

oddities.note: Document section contains only title and table of contents boilerplate; substantive entity references deferred to subsequent sections.
